chapter_title: Department of the California Highway Patrol
text: The commissioner shall make adequate provision for patrol of the highways at all times of the day and night.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2. Department of the California Highway Patrol [2100 - 2482]
#### Article 3. Powers and Duties [2400 - 2429.9]
##### § 2401

The commissioner shall make adequate provision for patrol of the highways at all times of the day and night.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The commissioner shall make adequate provision for patrol of the highways at all times of the day and night.
